headlines.title: An unhealthy focus on sex - Married at First Sight UK insiders on show's 'toxic' culture
headlines.description: Fresh revelations come after two women told the BBC they had been raped on the Channel 4 reality show.

headlines.title: Teenager is 10th person to die in water during heatwave
headlines.description: A body of a male teenager is recovered from water in Kent following a major search in Swanscombe.

headlines.title: The £5 coffee that tells a story of global economic turmoil
headlines.description: Coffees at some city centre outlets now cost £5. It's a story of tariffs, the climate, Gen Z cultural tastes, and savvy coffee farmers playing the market, writes Faisal Islam

headlines.title: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
headlines.description: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.

headlines.title: Girl raped by teenage boys tells BBC: 'I'm scared I'm going to see them'
headlines.description: The teenager tells BBC Newsnight she is suffering from flashbacks and living in fear following the attack.

headlines.title: Prostate cancer screening only for "a few thousand" high risk men
headlines.description: Only men with a dangerous genetic variant and a family history of cancer should be offered screening, say UK advisors.

headlines.title: US justice department launches criminal investigation into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll, reports say
headlines.description: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.

headlines.title: Heavy Israeli strikes hit southern Lebanon after large-scale evacuation orders
headlines.description: The Israeli military has ordered Lebanese residents to leave some 17% of the country's territory.

headlines.title: Mum who murdered 19-day-old daughter jailed for at least 19 years
headlines.description: Nicole Blain was found guilty last month of killing her 19-day-old child Thea Wilson in Greenock.

headlines.title: Ousted BP chairman hits back at 'lies' about his behaviour
headlines.description: Albert  Manifold said no-one should be "allowed to hide behind anonymity" when commenting on his time at BP.

headlines.title: UK's rudest chalk figure gets a glow-up to stop it fading in the rain
headlines.description: National Trust staff and volunteers will apply 17 tonnes of fresh chalk to the outline of the famous figure.

headlines.title: How my brother went from liberal Hollywood actor to manosphere 'messiah'
headlines.description: The sister of Mexican influencer El Temach tells the BBC she does not recognise him any more.

headlines.title: Paul McCartney on playing guitar with Paul Mescal: 'He knew it better than I did!'
headlines.description: The music legend sat down with the BBC to talk about his 20th solo album, The Boys of Dungeon Lane - and why he's intrigued by the new Beatles biopics.

headlines.title: The world's carmakers are struggling to compete with China
headlines.description: The BBC visited China’s EV factories and found they are dominating the ecosystems shaping the global auto industry.

headlines.title: My daughter woke up with a numb arm and died two weeks later
headlines.description: A mum whose daughter died weeks after a brain tumour diagnosis says her death must not be "in vain".

headlines.title: CSI tactics used to fight the fly-tippers
headlines.description: A council has a tough new strategy to deal with illegal dumping. Is it working?

headlines.title: What does hot weather do to the body?
headlines.description: Hot weather during the summer can affect anyone, but some people run a greater risk of serious harm.

headlines.title: We analysed thousands of Trump's posts - here's what we found
headlines.description: The BBC's Ros Atkins and BBC Verify sifted through thousands of the president's posts.

headlines.title: Sixteen pupils killed in Kenya school fire
headlines.description: Dozens of people were also injured in the fire, the cause of which is not yet known.

headlines.title: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
headlines.description: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"

headlines.title: New York mayor wears Arsenal kurta during Eid prayers
headlines.description: The mayor of New York City Zohran Mamdani takes his Arsenal super-fandom up a notch by attending Eid al-Adha prayers in the Bronx wearing an Arsenal-themed tunic.

headlines.title: Legal bid to block UK-backed French migrant detention centre
headlines.description: The Home Office says the UK won’t pay France if the site doesn’t open, under a deal to curb migrant crossings.

headlines.title: BBC News wins Emmy Award for coverage of Myanmar earthquake
headlines.description: Its reports and live updates on the devastating tremor were marked at an event in New York on Wednesday.

headlines.title: Clarke signs new Scotland deal until 2030 World Cup
headlines.description: Head coach Steve Clarke signs a new Scotland contract to cover the next two World Cups and the 2028 Euros.

headlines.title: Frustration mounts over Kent water supply disruption
headlines.description: South East Water blames demand for water during the hot weather for the multiple supply problems.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Tony Blair vs Labour?
headlines.description: The former Prime Minister says the Labour government has “no coherent plan”.

headlines.title: Are the Democrats ready to win in Texas?
headlines.description: The Senate race in Texas could determine which party controls Congress.

headlines.title: Clarke signs on until 2030 World Cup - a gamble SFA had to take?
headlines.description: Head coach Steve Clarke signs a new Scotland contract to cover the next two World Cups and the 2028 Euros.

headlines.title: The 7,000 minutes difference - why PSG could have edge over Arsenal
headlines.description: Why Paris St-Germain will be going into Saturday's Champions League final against Arsenal with one advantage.

headlines.title: Palace wait on Iraola with Lampard among plan Bs
headlines.description: Crystal Palace are waiting on an answer from Andoni Iraola but Coventry boss Frank Lampard could be a plan B for the Conference League winners.

headlines.title: Ecclestone targets World Cup glory after mental health struggle
headlines.description: England spinner Sophie Ecclestone on overcoming mental health struggles, her response to fitness criticism and how a T20 World Cup win would "put things right".

headlines.title: Are Premier League clubs flat-track bullies in Europe?
headlines.description: Two seasons, 21 knockout ties, 21 victories. Has money made the Premier League's dominance of the Europa League and the Conference League inevitable?

headlines.title: New York mayor wears Arsenal kurta during Eid prayers
headlines.description: The mayor of New York City Zohran Mamdani takes his Arsenal super-fandom up a notch by attending Eid al-Adha prayers in the Bronx wearing an Arsenal-themed tunic.
